responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Get the IVX Holdings Expo/React Native app (254 screens) previewable in the Rork emulator and synced with Expo Go for live testing ‚Äî no Swift involved.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: "I not want fuck swift" ‚Äî app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- This Rork workspace was started as a Swift project, so `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`

## Progress
### Done
- Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components ‚Äî TypeScript compiles with 0 errors
- Render repo repoint completed: was pinned to deleted `rork-ivxholding--1`, repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` via Render PATCH API; deploy `dep-d981qea8qa3s73b0gpp0` went live
- Production commit match verified: GitHub SHA `dcbf86fa` = Render SHA = `/health` SHA = `/version` SHA
- Owner auth verified live: `GET /api/ivx/owner-auth/diagnostic` ‚Üí 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected
- Enterprise guard bug found: 28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` call `assertIVXOwnerOnly(req)` without await ‚Üí unhandled rejection ‚Üí process crash ‚Üí 502
- Enterprise guard fix written locally: added `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper with try/catch, replaced all 28 bare calls, compiles successfully ‚Äî not yet deployed to production
- Full 100-module breakdown delivered (landing 8, auth 10, investing 12, wallet 6, growth 6, comms 7, legal 5, admin 18, owner suite 22, backend 6, infra 4, native 2)
- CRM verified present: `ivx-investor-crm.ts` (291 lines), `ivx-crm-dedup.ts` (313 lines), `ivx-lead-scoring.ts`, `ivx-deal-tracking.ts` + app-side services in `expo/src/modules/ivx-developer/`
- Reels module gap identified ‚Äî no standalone reels feed; only script generation in `admin/growth.tsx`
- GitHub repo timeline verified: created March 1, 2026 (‚âà4.5 months), 143 commits, last push July 9, 2026
- Other repos checked: `IPX-Luxury-holdings-` (Jan 21), `IPX-Holding-10` (Jan 25), `rork-testing-app` / `rork-testing-app-311` / `rork-native-app-development` all 404/private
- Workspace synced with GitHub repo via rsync from clone ‚Äî 0 diffs at last check
- Cloudflare Worker provisioned at `ivx26-backend.rork.app`, used temporarily for Render API proxy, then cleaned up

### In Progress
- Registering Expo app for emulator preview ‚Äî `createApp` rejected 4+ times; user still requesting it

### Blocked
- **`createApp` for react-native rejected**: "React Native app creation is only available when the project was started with React Native." ‚Äî platform hard limit, no workaround found
- **`runChecks` on expo fails**: "No app found at 'expo'. Available app paths: 'ios' (swift), 'functions' (cloudflare)."
- **Manual `rork.json` edit doesn't work**: runChecks ignores the expo entry even when present
- **Enterprise guard fix not deployed**: fix is in local `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` but hasn't synced to GitHub/Render yet
- **RENDER_API_KEY**: saved with extra text around token (prefix "Render ke", suffix "YPVs"); actual `rnd_` token extracted via regex `raw.match(/rnd_[A-Za-z0-9]+/)`

## Key Decisions
- User explicitly does NOT want Swift ‚Äî app is React Native (native) from day one
- Render service repointed from deleted repo to canonical repo via PATCH API call through a temporary Cloudflare Worker proxy
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers
- Temp Worker proxy cleaned up after Render repoint ‚Äî key no longer accessible via any endpoint
- Swift placeholder shells (`ios/`, `ios-ivx/`) are empty and don't affect the Expo app

## Next Steps
- Attempt to register Expo app for preview (user explicitly requesting it now)
- If still blocked, guide user to Expo Go testing: `git clone https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` ‚Üí `cd expo && bun install && bunx expo start` ‚Üí scan QR with Expo Go
- Deploy enterprise guard fix (rides auto-deploy pipeline on next sync)
- Optionally delete Swift placeholder folders (`ios/`, `ios-ivx/`) to eliminate confusion

## Critical Context
- Workspace project ID: `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (Swift project ‚Äî cannot preview React Native)
- GitHub canonical repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, 143 commits)
- Latest GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` ‚Äî matches live backend
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (GoTrue v2.192.0 healthy)
- Expo SDK 54, bundle ID `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- `ios/IVX26/ContentView.swift` ‚Äî still the empty placeholder ("App UI has not been generated yet")
- User referenced another Rork project: `rork.com/p/jh1qrutuhy6vu1bkysoln` (404 externally ‚Äî private to user's account)
- `rork.json` currently: IVX26 (swift, `ios`) + Functions (cloudflare, `functions`)

## Relevant Files
- `rork.json` ‚Äî workspace manifest; currently registers IVX26 (swift) + Functions (cloudflare); expo cannot be added
- `expo/` ‚Äî the full 254-screen React Native app (the real product)
- `expo/app.config.ts` ‚Äî Expo config: SDK 54, bundle `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- `expo/package.json` ‚Äî app dependencies and scripts (`bunx expo start`)
- `backend/hono.ts` ‚Äî 4,022-line Hono server, 637 routes, live on Render
- `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` ‚Äî enterprise routes (guard fix applied locally, needs deploy)
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-variables.ts` ‚Äî reference for correct owner guard pattern (try/catch + await)
- `backend/api/owner-only.ts` ‚Äî `assertIVXOwnerOnly` (async, must be awaited)
- `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts` ‚Äî `resolveIVXAuthenticatedRequest` (line 405), throws on missing token (line 422)
- `expo/lib/ivx-auth-proxy.ts` ‚Äî points to `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- `functions/index.ts` ‚Äî Cloudflare Worker (cleaned up, temp Render proxy removed)
- `ios/IVX26/ContentView.swift` ‚Äî empty Swift placeholder
- `ios-ivx/Ivx/` ‚Äî minimal Swift owner auth (8 files, not part of real app)
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/` ‚Äî landing page (index.html, support chat, SEO files)
- `render.yaml` ‚Äî Render blueprint: canonical repo, branch main, auto-deploy ON
